creator: dvl@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Corvin Köhne from comment #20)

I do not know how to bisect. If instructed, I can try.

The vm configuration is:

loader="uefi"
cpu="4"
memory="8GB"
network0_type="virtio-net"
network0_switch="public"
#disk0_type="nvme"
#disk0_type="ahci-hd"
disk0_type="virtio-blk"
disk0_name="disk0.img"
grub_run_partition="1"
grub_run_dir="/boot/grub"
uuid="9aae377a-6c06-11ed-a655-002590fa0f10"
network0_mac="58:9c:fc:08:5d:13"

The host is running a Home Assistant instance. Details on creating that instance at at https://dan.langille.org/2023/02/27/home-assistant-running-natively-on-freebsd-via-bhyve/
